title: About Exams
content:
Announcements

Details

Date: 06 February 2023

About Exams

Dear Students,

All of the associate degree, undergraduate and graduate exams that were previously planned to be held on 6-12 February 2023 will be administered on 13-19 February 2023.

According to the current condition, compulsory changes have been made on the fall semester academic calendar. You are required to follow the changes on the system.

We wish speedy recovery to our nation and our students and wish healthy days hoping that such event will not happen again.

Rectorate

Paylaş
